# Isolated `Miniconda`, `Python`, and `Matlab` (experimental) Environment

The goal of `rpymat` is to create a single isolated `Miniconda` and
`Python` environment for reproducible pipeline scripts. The package is a
shell of `reticulate` package, but provides more stable behaviors,
especially on â€˜ARMâ€™ machines.

## Installation

You can install the released version of rpymat from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r

install.packages("rpymat")
```

## Configure environment

Configure python after installation

``` r

# change `python_ver` accordingly
rpymat::configure_conda(python_ver = 'auto')
```

Add `Python` or `conda` packages

``` r

# Add conda packages
rpymat::add_packages(c('pandas', 'numpy'))

# Add conda packages from channels
rpymat::add_packages(c('h5py'), channel = "conda-forge")

# Add pip packages
rpymat::add_packages(c('sklearn'), pip = TRUE)
```

## Use `Jupyterlab`

``` r

# Install Jupyterlab, will install
# numpy, h5py, matplotlib, pandas, 
# jupyter, jupyterlab, jupyterlab-git, ipywidgets, jupyter-server-proxy
# jupyterlab_latex, jupyterlab_github, matlab_kernel
rpymat::add_jupyter()

# Launch Jupyterlab
rpymat::jupyter_launch(async = FALSE)
```

#### Advanced configurations:

``` r

rpymat::jupyter_launch(
    async = TRUE, workdir = "~",
    port = 18888, open_browser = TRUE,
    token = "IwontTellYouMyToken"
)
```

To query existing servers

``` r

rpymat::jupyter_server_list()
#>        host  port                                              token
#> 1 127.0.0.1  8888 3hzWfGPa0EOmonaNS48jrTvpw07KiX7VKerA9ZTFJMkCOJMgfB
#> 2 127.0.0.1 18888                                IwontTellYouMyToken
```

To stop a server

``` r

rpymat::jupyter_server_stop(port = 18888)
```

## Use `rpymat` with `reticulate`

``` r

# Initialize the isolated environment

rpymat::ensure_rpymat()

rpymat::repl_python()
```

Then run python code interactively.

Alternatively, you can use `rpymat::run_script(path)` to execute
`Python` scripts, and use
[`reticulate::py`](https://rstudio.github.io/reticulate/reference/py.html)
to obtain the results.

## 

## Uninstall

The following command will erase the environment completely.

``` r

rpymat::remove_conda()
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`choose_fileopen()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/choose-file.md)
  [`choose_filesave()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/choose-file.md)
  [`choose_directory()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/choose-file.md)
  :

  Choose file or directory to open via `'Python'`

- [`CONDAENV_NAME()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`conda_path()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`conda_bin()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`env_path()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`list_pkgs()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`configure_matlab()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`configure_conda()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`conda_tos()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`remove_conda()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`add_packages()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`ensure_rpymat()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`matlab_engine()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md)
  [`call_matlab()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/conda-env.md) :
  'Miniconda' environment

- [`custom_env_support()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/custom_env_support.md)
  :

  Whether supports customized `'conda'` environment

- [`add_jupyter()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_bin()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_register_R()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_options()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_launch()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_check_launch()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_server_list()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_server_stop()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  [`jupyter_server_stop_all()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/jupyter.md)
  : Install, register, launch 'Jupyter' notebook to the virtual
  environment

- [`py_builtin()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/py_builtin.md) :
  Get 'Python' built-in object

- [`py_list()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/py_list.md) : List
  in 'Python'

- [`py_slice()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/py_slice.md) :
  Slice index in 'Python' arrays

- [`read_xlsx()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/read_xlsx.md) :

  Read data frame from a `'xlsx'` file

- [`repl_python()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/repl_python.md)
  : Enable interactive 'python' from R

- [`import_main()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`tuple()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_tuple()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_help()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`np_array()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`import()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`r_to_py()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_to_r()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_to_r_wrapper()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_str()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_run_string()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_bool()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_dict()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_call()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_del_attr()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_del_item()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_eval()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_get_attr()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_set_attr()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_get_item()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_set_item()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_len()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  [`py_none()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/reticulate-reexports.md)
  :

  Wrappers around `'reticulate'` package

- [`py`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/rpymat-python-main.md) :
  Get 'Python' main process environment

- [`cmd_create()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  [`cmd_set_env()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  [`cmd_set_workdir()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  [`cmd_set_conda()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  [`cmd_build()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  [`detect_shell()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  [`run_command()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_command.md)
  : Execute command with additional environments

- [`run_script()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_pyscript.md)
  [`run_pyscript()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_pyscript.md)
  [`run_pystring()`](http://dipterix.org/rpymat/reference/run_pyscript.md)
  : Run 'Python' script
